nasb.text: So you shall keep My statutes and My judgments, by which a man may live if he does them; I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall therefore keep my statutes and my rules; if a person does them, he shall live by them: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 所以你們要謹守我的律例和典章；人應該遵行這些，按照它們生活，我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 你们要遵守我的典章和律例。遵行的人必存活。我是耶和华。
